subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath come into the presence of the Throne and been adorned with the lights of His countenance. The cry of all was heard, and the forgiveness of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و بانوار وجه مزین گشت ندای کل استماع شد و غفران رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
